rationale: Educ. Code §29.554 governs insurance coverage for P-TECH program partners and students. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, school district property tax revenue, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the homestead exemption.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may obtain accident medical expense, liability, or automobile insurance coverage
_note: No relationship between this statute and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
